scripts.build: rm -rf packages/shared/dist packages/renderer/dist packages/electron/dist packages/cli/dist && yarn workspace onote-shared build && yarn workspace onote-renderer build && yarn workspace onote-cli build && yarn workspace onote-electron build
scripts.compile: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build && yarn workspace onote-cli build:binary && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron-builder --config .electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.dev: yarn build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=8192" node scripts/watch.js
